rationale: The citing paper builds a forward-looking SFV metric from customer-level CLV forecasts and reports forecast validation, while the cited paper focuses on churn-model predictive accuracy and links accuracy to CLV/profit economics—so a plausible methodological/foundational connection exists. However, the provided match evidence is only a single DOI-listed reference (index 38) with no in-text citation context or quoted usage, so the current evidence is insufficient to clearly classify as substantive.
